assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 13: '**Checkout target branch**: `git checkout TC-9005` — the Target Branch is a feature branch (TC-9005), not main.' Explicitly uses git checkout TC-9005, not git checkout main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 17-19: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" --body "..."' and line 88: '**Base branch**: TC-9005 (feature branch)'. The PR targets TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 15: '**Create task branch**: `git checkout -b TC-9205` — branch named after the Jira issue ID, created from TC-9005.' and line 89: '**Head branch**: TC-9205'. The task branch TC-9205 is clearly distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 37-40 under 'Pre-Implementation Verification': 'Verify that `entity/src/advisory.rs` does NOT reference a `status` column', 'Read `migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs` to understand the existing migration pattern', and 'Read `migration/src/lib.rs` to understand how migrations are registered'. All three files are explicitly referenced for pre-implementation inspection.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 73-82 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows type(scope): description format, and footer line 'Implements TC-9205' references the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 13: '**Checkout target branch**: `git checkout TC-9005` — the Target Branch is a feature branch (TC-9005), not main.' and line 88: '**Base branch**: TC-9005 (feature branch)'. The plan explicitly identifies TC-9005 as the target/feature branch and distinguishes it from main.
